title: テイエムオペラオー登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Cheers.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Can you hear it? The thunderous adulation, all for
me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Cheers.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If you hear it, know that it's a mere hallucination.
For in reality...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is the sound of praise that will ring out in my
future.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, raise the curtain on this magnificent opera.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, for this is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Unfathomable beauty and unrivaled
strength—the origin story of the Centurial
Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's happened. T.M. Opera O is in the Twinkle
Series at last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should tell her now, though. Umamusume are
normally training at the track around this time.
However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark! This beauty that is in me, that is in the
reflection of this mirror, that is on the floor upon
which I stand...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I fear the mirror might crack from the stress of
containing so much magnetism. But crack it
should!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Why does it not crack?
choice_data_list: Opera O, do you have a minute?
Opera O, do you have a minute?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Well, if it isn't my one and only trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What brings you at this hour? Was the desire to
look upon me so strong that you raced here with
all speed?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Wh-wh-WHAAAT?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What did you just say? I didn't quite catch it, but
I could swear you said...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That I am to take part in the Twinkle Series... Was
it something along those lines?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see, yes. So the time has come.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The great suffering that Umamusume fans had to
endure comes to mind. You might ask why...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It is because they have never been able to witness my immense beauty, my immense talent, my immense nobility racing across the track.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A life without my presence is not worth living. It is
no different than to be imprisoned in the deepest
depths of the underworld.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A true age of darkness! But that melancholy has
come to an end!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The masses must know the Overlord, so the light of happiness can shine upon them.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With my entry decided, things cannot remain like
this. Now, Trainer, we must train!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We've come to the track to begin, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ahem. First, to rehearse my victory performance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To do so... a quick scamper across the green turf
should suffice!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Whew... I have not the time to be winded. The masses await my wondrous words!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hello, one and all! Did you have an invigorating
view of my beautiful stride?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am the one and only T.M. Opera O—the
stunning and powerful Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Soon to become the Centurial Overlord—the
Umamusume who will conquer this world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What? The turn of the century has long since
passed, you say? Heh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fear not. In the face of my gorgeous visage, this
twilight will end, and the next turn will commence
before you even know it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This is what training means to T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While parading around calling herself the
Overlord, some of her antics prove
productive—others not so much...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her constant pausing to display these
over-the-top performances, the way she
proclaims her lordliness shows a lot of potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The intensity of her assertions coincide with her
ability.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The prelude has concluded. My preparations are
complete.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall make dreams come true with my
jaw-dropping victory and stake my claim as the
Centurial Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My radiant beauty shall become the sun that
illuminates the ignorant masses—and the world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us take the first step down our victory
road, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Guide me to the summit of the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She asks me to lead, despite her being the one
boldly speeding ahead.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Celebrate, peoples of the world! For
my journey begins now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She yells at the top of her lungs from the rooftop.
The other Umamusume at the academy stare up
at us, dumbfounded.
